US1.title: Goodreads inline library availability
US1.description: As a Goodreads user viewing a book page, I want to know whether OCPL has the book so I can decide whether to borrow it from the library instead of buying it.

US2.title: Amazon inline library availability
US2.description: As an Amazon user viewing a book page, I want the same library answer inline without leaving the page.

US3.title: Prefer ISBN over loose matching
US3.description: As a user, when the exact ISBN is present, I want the extension to prefer that match over looser title/author matching.

US4.title: Link to catalog result
US4.description: As a user, when a book is in the OCPL catalog, I want a direct link to the relevant catalog result.

US5.title: Meaningful availability states
US5.description: As a user, I want the extension to distinguish available now, hold/request likely needed, not found, and lookup failed.

US6.title: Safe degradation on bad input or drift
US6.description: As a user, I want the extension to behave safely when Goodreads/Amazon metadata is incomplete or the library catalog changes unexpectedly.

US7.title: Per-format catalog availability
US7.description: As a user viewing a book on Goodreads or Amazon, I want to see which formats OCPL offers (print book, ebook, audiobook) and each format’s availability so I can choose how to borrow.
